title: Newsletter Sign Up | Martin Rhodes MP
meta_description: Sign up to our newsletter to stay up to date with what Martin is doing
headings: h2: Stay up to date with Martin!
text_excerpt: Newsletter Sign Up | Martin Rhodes MP Martin Rhodes MP MP for Glasgow North Local Surgeries Newsletter Sign Up What can an MP do Contributions Contact Local Surgeries Newsletter Sign Up What can an MP do Contributions Contact --> Newsletter Sign Up Stay up to date with Martin! Sign up for the newsletter to get the latest on Martin’s work in Parliament and across the constituency – from speaking up on national issues to supporting local campaigns and community events. Hear about upcoming surgeries, community news, and how Martin is working to make a difference both locally and nationally. Newsletter sign up Name (Required) First Last Email Post Code CAPTCHA By submitting this form I agree to the privacy policy I agree You can manage your preferences or unsubscribe at any time by emailing your communication preferences. To understand how your personal data is used please see our ( Privacy Policy ).
